calendar.matters:
Petitioner Michael Ramirez' Notice Of Motion And Motion For Ruling On Verified Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus (For Tentative Ruling Purposes Only) (Part 3 Of 3)
Off Calendar Apr-11-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Petitioner Michael Ramirez' Motion For Ruling On Verified Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus (For Tentative Ruling Purposes Only) (Part 3 Of 3) is a duplicate entry. [302]

Petitioner Michael Ramirez' Notice Of Motion And Motion For Ruling On Verified Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus (For Tentative Ruling Purposes Only) (Part 2 Of 3)
Off Calendar Apr-11-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Petitioner Michael Ramirez' Motion For Ruling On Verified Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus (For Tentative Ruling Purposes Only) is a duplicate entry. [302]

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Ruling On Verified Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Jul-12-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Lina Balciunas Cockrell, Esq. of Messing Adam & Jasmine, T:916.446.5297, for petitioner/moving party;
Tawni Parr, Esq., Labor Relations Counsel, CA Dept. of Human Resources, T:916.324.0512, for respondent/opposing party.

RULING: The tentative ruling was contested and argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court takes the entirety of PETITIONER MICHAEL RAMIREZ's Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus under submission.

Petitioner's counsel stipulated on the record that she does not require the Court to return the set of Administrative Records lodged with the Court on March 27, 2018.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org.
